title: Tacit Collection Questionnaire
intro: Help future citizens by sharing what you know about this office. Eight short questions. Speak in whichever language is comfortable — Nepali, Roman-Nepali, English, or mixed.
intro_ne: तपाईंले जान्नुभएको कुरा साझा गरेर भविष्यका नागरिकहरूलाई मद्दत गर्नुहोस्। आठ छोटा प्रश्नहरू। तपाईंलाई सजिलो लाग्ने भाषामा बोल्नुहोस् — नेपाली, रोमन-नेपाली, अंग्रेजी, वा मिश्रित।

questions.question: What is the official name of this office? What do citizens commonly call it?
questions.question_ne: यो कार्यालयको आधिकारिक नाम के हो? नागरिकहरूले यसलाई के भनेर बोलाउँछन्?

questions.question: Where exactly is the office? Building, floor, ward, nearby landmarks.
questions.question_ne: कार्यालय कहाँ छ? भवन, तला, वडा, नजिकैका चिन्हहरू।

questions.question: When a citizen walks in for the first time, which counter do they visit first, and what happens there?
questions.question_ne: नागरिक पहिलो पटक आउँदा कुन काउन्टरमा जान्छन्, र त्यहाँ के हुन्छ?

questions.question: Which documents do people most often forget to bring? What happens when they do?
questions.question_ne: मानिसहरूले सबैभन्दा बढी कुन कागजात ल्याउन बिर्सन्छन्? बिर्सिएमा के हुन्छ?

questions.question: Best time of day to come? Worst time (long queues, lunch break, busy season)?
questions.question_ne: आउने सबैभन्दा राम्रो समय कुन हो? सबैभन्दा खराब समय (लामो लाइन, खाजा, व्यस्त मौसम)?

questions.question: What are the top three reasons people get rejected or sent back from this office?
questions.question_ne: मानिसहरूलाई यो कार्यालयबाट फिर्ता पठाउने तीन प्रमुख कारण के हुन्?

questions.question: Where do people park? What public transport options are nearby?
questions.question_ne: मानिसहरू कहाँ पार्किङ गर्छन्? नजिकै कुन सार्वजनिक यातायात उपलब्ध छ?

questions.question: What's one thing you wish every citizen knew before walking into this office?
questions.question_ne: हरेक नागरिकले यो कार्यालय आउनु अघि जान्नैपर्ने एउटा कुरा के हो?
